body.purpose: Dense explanatory copy and UI text.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Future hover or focus state changes only.

components.name: Report Panel
components.description: Flat joined container with a fine instrument line.
components.html:
Token intensity

Total means input plus cached plus output.
components.css: .ds-report-panel { background: oklch(0.135 0.010 258); color: oklch(0.940 0.010 258); border: 1px solid oklch(0.285 0.020 258); border-radius: 0; padding: 24px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-report-panel h3 { margin: 0; font-size: 1rem; } .ds-report-panel p { margin: 6px 0 0; color: oklch(0.720 0.018 258); }

components.name: Metric Cell
components.description: Compact label plus tabular value cell for summary strips.
components.css: .ds-metric { background: oklch(0.135 0.010 258); color: oklch(0.940 0.010 258); border: 1px solid oklch(0.285 0.020 258); border-radius: 0; padding: 18px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-metric dt { color: oklch(0.720 0.018 258); font-size: 0.82rem; } .ds-metric dd { margin: 4px 0 0; font-size: 1.45rem; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: -0.02em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Token Bar
components.description: Fixed label, proportional track, and numeric value for token buckets.
components.css: .ds-token-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 84px minmax(0, 1fr) 72px; gap: 14px; align-items: center; color: oklch(0.940 0.010 258); font-family: ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', sans-serif; } .ds-token-row span { color: oklch(0.720 0.018 258); } .ds-token-row b { text-align: right; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-track { height: 10px; background: oklch(0.245 0.018 258); overflow: hidden; } .ds-track i { display: block; height: 100%; background: oklch(0.681 0.132 258.4); }

narrative.overview: This system is a tactical report surface for local agent activity. It uses a near-black architectural ground, cobalt instrumentation, and amber attention marks to make dense data readable without becoming a terminal costume.
keyCharacteristics: Flat at rest, with depth created through tonal layers.
Product UI first, visual identity second.

rules.name: The No Purple SaaS Rule
rules.body: Purple gradients are prohibited. Cobalt is a functional instrument color, not a gradient decoration.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Amber appears only where the eye needs to land. If it covers more than a few labels or badges, the report is too loud.

rules.name: The No Terminal Type Rule
rules.body: Do not use monospace as the primary voice. Tabular numerals are allowed for alignment, but the report must not look like an ANSI terminal dump.

rules.name: The Joined Surface Rule
rules.body: Related data should connect edge to edge with shared dividers. Do not scatter unrelated floating cards across the canvas.

dos: Do keep the report dense, with clear seams and compact rank lists.
Do use OKLCH tokens directly in CSS.
Do reserve amber for labels and attention marks.
Do keep estimates honest: missing pricing data must read as n/a.
Do keep the HTML standalone, with no external fonts, scripts, or assets.
donts: Don't use generic SaaS card grids, purple gradients, decorative glass panels, terminal-type novelty, console/ANSI clones, or overly playful marketing visuals.
Don't use decorative shadows or frosted panels.
Don't add rounded 32px cards or pill-shaped report panels.
Don't let long model names overflow their container.
